title: DarkerNeon Cyan
description: Gui made with neon style, named DarkerNeon Cyan color
body:
![DarkerNeon Cyan color gui and hud](https://i.imgur.com/91O1Rki.png)

DarkerNeon Cyan is a resourcepack that change all the game guis and uis for a neon style with black and cyan.

**This is now the ONLY version**:
- Hud icons change
- Menu background image
- Widgets menu textures
- survival and adventure inventory
- creative inventory
- all the containers from all the tables made, even villager inventory, horses, and all the others
